title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 03 July 2026
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 03 July 2026
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 03 July 2026
summary:
Main
Market sentiment softened further through the week, with local ship recycling prices continuing to trend downward amid persistent weakness in buying interest. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2026-07-04_best-oasis-weekly-recycling-market-report-03-july-2026_weekly-ship-recycling-report-27-june_84d9d314c093.pdf

[Page 2]
MARKET SUMMARY
INDIA
Market sentiment softened further through the week, with local ship recycling prices
continuing to trend downward amid persistent weakness in buying interest. Discussions remain ongoing between Indian recycling yards and the European Union
regarding the inclusion of three Indian yards on the EU-approved recycling list, with
one of our yards among the applicants.
